tokens.notes: Dominant primary brand color; headlines, links, icon strokes. RGB 0,82,155; CMYK 100,76,6,1; Pantone 2145 C.
RGB 250,163,27; CMYK 0,42,100,0; Pantone 137 C. Secondary accent in banner naming.
RGB 255,198,10; CMYK 0,23,100,0; Pantone 7548 C. Reserved for emphasizing key figures; logo mark uses 70% transparency.
RGB 53,140,203; CMYK 75,35,0,0. Chart dominant color; subheads in text-heavy callout.
RGB 0,61,116; CMYK 100,83,29,14. Button fill in gradient callout CTA.
RGB 1,30,69; CMYK 100,89,40,49. Drop-shadow color at low opacity.
RGB 242,106,56; CMYK 0,73,87,0. Sparing tertiary accent only; never CTAs/headlines/data; avoid in email.
RGB 230,240,249; CMYK 8,2,0,0. Callout box fill, chart panel.
RGB 254,241,200; CMYK 0,3,24,0. Text-heavy callout box fill.
RGB 33,33,33; CMYK 0,0,0,88. Body text on light backgrounds.
RGB 255,255,255. Text on dark backgrounds, icon badge fill, section background.
Gold arrow color used in gradient callout CTA button (distinct hex from #ffc60a).

Dark stop of the CTA shape linear gradient SVG (note distinct hex from #faa31b).

Blue backgrounds, waves.
Warm backgrounds. Second stop is Gold at 75%.
Soft light backgrounds.
Warm light-to-saturated backgrounds.
